name: AURORA
author: Sean McCormick
description: Northern-lights desktop skin. A classic 3-across square grid under a slow aurora that breathes colour behind the photography, with a configurable colour wave rippling across the tile borders. Dark, dramatic, and built so the photos are why you came.

au_palette.label: Colour Palette

options.solar: Solar Storm — green into red aurora

au_palette.hint: Drives both the background aurora and the border wave. Palettes are defined in aurora-config.php.

au_l1_opacity.label: Background Opacity
au_l1_opacity.hint: How present the aurora feels behind the grid.

au_cycle_time.label: Aurora Cycle Time
au_cycle_time.hint: Seconds for one full pass through the palette. Higher = slower. Default is deliberately geological.

au_wave_speed.label: Wave Speed
au_wave_speed.hint: Border-wave clock, independent of the sky cycle. Lower = faster shimmer; higher = slower. 160 is the original counterpoint pace.

au_border_opacity.label: Border Opacity
au_border_opacity.hint: Strength of the tile border ring.

au_nav_line_color.label: Nav Line Colour
au_nav_line_color.hint: Colour of the divider lines above/below the sticky nav. Ignored when Nav Line Mode follows the aurora wave.

au_nav_underline.label: Nav Line Under-line
options: On — dark indigo line tucked under each nav line
au_nav_underline.hint: The decorative second line under each nav divider.

au_navbar_color.label: Navbar Colour
au_navbar_color.hint: Background colour of the sticky nav bar. PHP-handled → --au-navbar-bg.

au_navbar_opacity.label: Navbar Opacity — Landing
au_navbar_opacity.hint: Landing page only. 0 = transparent. Raise for a solid bar over the aurora.

au_navbar_opacity_inner.label: Navbar Opacity — Other Pages
au_navbar_opacity_inner.hint: Archive / post / static pages. Leave blank to match the Landing value.

au_nav_line_mode.label: Nav Border Lines

options.aurora: Aurora wave (shifts with the tile borders)

au_nav_line_mode.hint: Aurora mode tracks the live border wave colour.

au_nav_line_opacity.label: Nav Line Opacity
au_nav_line_opacity.hint: Opacity of the nav divider lines (both the bright rule and its companion).

au_nav_glow_color.label: Nav Glow Colour
au_nav_glow_color.hint: Outer glow behind the menu links (home / blogroll / pages).

au_posts_color.label: Posts Colour
au_posts_color.hint: Colour of the post-count number and the "posts" label in the profile header. PHP-handled -> --post-count-color.

au_posts_glow_size.label: Posts Glow Size
au_posts_glow_size.hint: 0 = no glow (falls back to the profile text glow).

au_panel_color.label: Panel Colour
au_panel_color.hint: Backing colour behind the content column on every page so it reads over the aurora. PHP-handled → --panel-bg.

au_panel_opacity.label: Panel Opacity
au_panel_opacity.hint: 0 = transparent (the aurora shows through). Raise until text is comfortable to read.

au_panel_extend.label: Panel Extend (gutters)
au_panel_extend.hint: How far the panel bleeds out past the content each side. 0 = flush, 100 = 100px gutters.

skin_avatar.label: Profile Avatar
skin_avatar.hint: Square image recommended. Displayed as a circle, ~77px.

au_glow_color.label: Text Glow Colour
au_glow_color.hint: Halo colour behind title, tagline, and bio. Black for dark glow; white for light glow.

au_glow_size.label: Text Glow Size
au_glow_size.hint: 0 = no glow. Increase for a wider halo.

options.per_carousel: Per Post (each post defines its own style)
options.per_image: Per Image (each photo has its own style)

au_treatment_mode.label: Background Treatment
au_treatment_mode.hint: Optional. A treatment sits in front of the aurora layer — leave on None to let the aurora show.

au_treatment_image.label: Treatment Image
au_treatment_image.hint: Used when Treatment = Background image. Minimum 1920×1080px.

au_treatment_overlay.label: Overlay  (left darkens · right lightens)
au_treatment_overlay.hint: Centre = none. Drag left to darken the background, right to lighten it.

au_nav_tile_gap.label: Nav → Tiles Gap
au_nav_tile_gap.hint: Vertical space between the sticky nav bar and the first row of tiles.

gsd_disc_color.label: Dock Circle Colour
gsd_disc_color.hint: Colour of the round dock behind the magnifier. PHP-handled → --gsd-disc-bg.

gsd_disc_opacity.label: Dock Circle Opacity
gsd_disc_opacity.hint: Transparency of the dock circle so it can blend into the background.

gsd_glass_color.label: Dock Magnifier Colour
gsd_glass_color.hint: Colour of the magnifying-glass icon. PHP-handled → --gsd-glass-color.
